somali.no_matches_try_a_different_keyword: Wax u dhigma majiro. Isku day ered kale oo muhiim ah.
somali.balance_atoms_in_atoms_out: Dheelitir — atamyada soo gelaya = atamyada baxaya
somali.lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: ilaalinta cufka. Xeeladda waa isku-dhufashada (MAAHA nambarka hoose). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Marka hore dheelitir biraha, kadibna kuwa aan biraha ahayn, kadibna haydarojiin iyo ugu dambeyntii ogsijiin.
somali.synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Isku-darka (A+B→AB), kala-qaybinta (AB→A+B), beddelka keliya (A+BC→AC+B), beddelka labanlaab (AB+CD→AD+CB), gubashada (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). 95% isleegyada dugsiga waxay ku jiraan mid ka mid ah.
somali.1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: 1 mole = 6.022×10²³ qaybood (Avogadro). Cufka molar = wadarta cufka atamka. Garaam → mole → mole → garaam. Buundada u dhaxaysa isleegyada la dheelitiray iyo qaddarka shaybaarka.
somali.vsepr_predicts_shape_linear_trigonal_p: VSEPR waxay saadaalisaa qaabka: toosan, saddex-xagal fidsan, tetrahedral, ahraam saddex-xagal ah, qalloocan. Labooyinka kaligood waxay qaataan meel badan marka loo eego labooyinka isku-xirka. CH₄ waa tetrahedron kaamil ah; NH₃ waa in yar la riixay.
somali.9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: 9 sawir-astaan GHS: qarxa, ololiya, oksaydiya, gaas cadaadis leh, xagxaga, sun, xanuujiya, khatarta deegaanka, khatarta caafimaadka. Aashitada biyaha gali (weligaa ha rogin) — dhabaqddu waa xoog badan tahay.
somali.challenge_graded_quiz_across_3_tiers: Caqabad — imtixaan la qiimeeyay oo 3 heer ah
somali.beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Bilow = magacaabista + tirinta atamka; Dhexdhexaad = dheelitirka; Sare = xisaabta mole + falgale xaddidan. Mawduucyada AP Chem 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
somali.speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Xawaaraha wuxuu dhisaa toosnaan. Marka dheelitirka + magacaabista ay noqdaan toos, xusuusta shaqada waxaa loo furaa fikir heer sare ah, sida saadaalinta samaynta alaabta iyo isbeddellada dheellitirka.
somali.learn_concepts_by_grade_band: Baro — fikradaha marka loo eego heerka fasalka
somali.k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: walxaha waa shay. 3-5: walxaha way wareegaan. MS: atamyo + xeryahood fudud. HS: fikir buuxa oo miiska xilliyeed leh. AP: thermodynamics + kinetics + dheellitir. Isku-hagaajinta toosan waxay dhex martaa fasal kasta.
somali.autobalance_hint: Ku qor falgalayaashaada iyo alaabtaada. Waxaa lagu xalliyaa si sax ah xisaabta ilaalinta atamka — macallinka AI weligiis maaha maamul isku-dhufashada.
somali.already_balanced_note: Waad ku qortay iyadoo hore loo dheelitiray — aad u wanaagsan.
somali.balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Dheelitir hal curiye markiiba • Ka bilow xeryahooda ugu adag • U dhaaf O ama H kan ugu dambeeya
somali.yield_hint: Geli falcelinta, kadibna sheeg immisa garaam oo falgale kasta aad haysato.
somali.actual_grams_produced: Garaamka dhabta ah ee la soo saaray
somali.protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Ka ilaali indhahaaga dhabaqda, qiiqa iyo jajabka. Xidho muraayadaha ilaalinta ka hor intaadan bilaabin oomana bixin ilaa nadiifintu dhammaato.
somali.nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Galoofyada nitrile waxay ka ilaaliyaan inta badan kimikaalka shaybaarka. Beddel isla markiiba haddii ay dilaacaan ama ay wasakhoobaan.
somali.use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Isticmaal farsamada marooryada: qabo weelka meel fog oo si tartiib ah gacantaada u hagi hawada sanka.
somali.chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Wasakhaynta kimikaadku waa muuqan waayaa. Xitaa raadadka gacmaha ama dusha waa la liqi karaa.
somali.wash_thoroughly_with_soap_and_water_fo: Si fiican u dhaq saabuun iyo biyo ugu yaraan 20 ilbiriqsi, xitaa haddii aad xidhatay galoof.
somali.before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Ka hor intaadan bilaabin shaybaar kasta, hel dab-demiyaha ugu dhow, saldhigga dhaqidda indhaha, qubeyska degdegga iyo albaabbada bixitaanka.
somali.no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: Iyadoon loo eegin sida ay u yar tahay. Macallinkaagu wuxuu u baahan yahay inuu ogaado si uu u qaado tallaabooyinka nadiifinta iyo amniga ee habboon.
somali.test_your_chemistry_knowledge_across_3: Tijaabi aqoontaada kimistariga 3 heer oo adag!
somali.a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: Curiye caasi ah ayaa xasilloonida xeryahood carqaladeynaya! Ka jawaab su'aalaha kimistariga si aad u soo celiso xasilloonida!
somali.answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Si sax ah u jawaab si aad dhaawac u gaysato. Jawaabaha khaldan waxay carqaladeeyaan xasilloonida xeryahoodkaaga!
somali.20_chemistry_careers_spanning_research: In ka badan 20 xirfadood oo kimistari ah oo daboolaya cilmi-baaris, warshadaha, waxbarasho iyo nidaaminta.
somali.15_ready_to_use_classroom_labs_for_k_1: 15 shaybaar fasal oo diyaar u ah in la isticmaalo K-12.
somali.common_chemistry_misconceptions_debunk: Fahamka qaldan ee caadiga ah ee kimistariga waa la beeniyay.
somali.every_atom_in_your_body_was_forged_in_: Atam kasta oo jidhkaaga ku jira waxaa lagu tumay xiddig.
somali.every_reaction_you_observe_was_already: Falcelin kasta oo aad aragto waxay dhacaysay 4 bilyan sano ka hor.
somali.now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Hadda waxaad haysataa qalabka aad ku fahmi karto adduunka lagaa sameeyay.
somali.three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Saddex sliders: exponent-ka H⁺ (miisaanka log), awoodda buffer, kulaylka. Xalku wuxuu muujiyaa mid ka mid ah 5 band oo pH ah oo kala duwan. Dhibco malaha, muujin malaha — jiid oo fiiri.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah — jawaab sax ah malaha): Sidee buffer-ku u saameeyaa xiriirka H+ → pH?
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Qabo laba sliders si adag. Jiid saddexaad. Fiiri waxa dhacaya.
somali.what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: Maxaa ku dhaca biyaha saafiga ah (exponent-ka H⁺ = -7) marka kulaylku isbeddelo?
somali.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_b: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara band isku mid ah. Maxay wadaagaan?
somali.investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Baar: maxay miisaanka pH u yahay logarithmic?
somali.i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: Waxaan filayaa inaan fahmay — ku sharax ereyadaada
somali.explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Sharax sida uruurinta H⁺, buffering iyo kulaylku ay wada go'aamiyaan pH.
somali.design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad pH oo kala duwan oo 5 band ah; ma jiro bar-tilmaameed hagaajin tiro ah; muujin malaha — si ula kac ah.
somali.periodic_table_four_major_blocks: ⚛ Miiska xilliyeed — afar block oo waaweyn

lingala.no_matches_try_a_different_keyword: Eloko ekokani te. Meka liloba mosusu.
lingala.balance_atoms_in_atoms_out: Kokanisa — atome oyo ezali kokota = atome oyo ezali kobima
lingala.lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: kobatela kilo. Mayele ezali koefisiã (EZALI TE motango ya nse). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Kokanisa liboso bibende, na sima oyo ezali bibende te, na sima idrojɛ́nɛ mpe oksijɛ́nɛ na nsuka.
lingala.synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Bosangisi (A+B→AB), bokabwani (AB→A+B), bobongoli moko (A+BC→AC+B), bobongoli mibale (AB+CD→AD+CB), kozika (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). 95% ya ba équations ya eteyelo ekɔtaka na moko na yango.
lingala.1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: Mole 1 = bapatikili 6.022×10²³ (Avogadro). Kilo ya molar = motango ya kilo ya atome. Gram → mole → mole → gram. Gbagba kati ya ba équations oyo ekokanisami mpe motango ya laboratware.
lingala.vsepr_predicts_shape_linear_trigonal_p: VSEPR esakolaka lolenge: alignɛ, triangle patatalu, tetraedri, piramide triangle, egumbami. Ba paires oyo ezali yango moko ezwaka esika mingi koleka ba paires ya bofandisi. CH₄ ezali tetraedri ya kokoka; NH₃ efinami mwa moke.
lingala.lab_safety_ghs_symbols_emergency_respo: Bokengeli ya laboratware — bilembo GHS + eyano ya lombangu
lingala.9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: Bilembo 9 ya GHS: epasukaka, ezikaka, oksidasyõ, gaz ya minyoli, ekótaka, poizõ, esɛnzaka, likama ya zinga-zinga, likama ya bokolongono. Asidi na mai (mokolo moko te bongo) — kopanzana ezali makasi.
lingala.challenge_graded_quiz_across_3_tiers: Momekano — eksamɛ oyo epesami banzelo na ba niveaux 3
lingala.beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Ebandeli = kopesa nkombo + kotanga atome; Katikati = bokokanisi; Likolo = matematiki ya mole + réactif ya ndelo. Ba sujets ya AP Chem 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
lingala.element_battle_retrieval_as_combat: Etumba ya Element — bozongisi lokola etumba
lingala.speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Mbangu etongaka bomikeli. Tango bokokanisi + kopesa nkombo ekómaka ya yango moko, mémoire ya mosala ekómaka pɛtɛɛ mpo na kokanisa ya likolo, lokola kosakola bobimisi ya biloko mpe mbongwana ya bokatikati.
lingala.learn_concepts_by_grade_band: Yekola — makanisi na kotala niveau ya kelasi
lingala.k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: eloko ezali eloko. 3-5: eloko ebalukaka. MS: atome + ba composés ya pɛtɛɛ. HS: kokanisa mobimba na tablo ya ba périodes. AP: thermodinamiki + kinetiki + bokatikati. Alignement ya semba eleka na kelasi nyonso.
lingala.autobalance_hint: Koma ba réactifs mpe biloko na yo moko. Esilisami malamu na matematiki ya kobatela atome — molakisi ya AI azali mokonzi ya ba coefficients ata moke te.
lingala.balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Kokanisa element moko na mbala moko • Banda na composé ya mindɔndɔ mingi • Tika O to H mpo na nsuka
lingala.enter_a_valid_formula_above: Kotisa formule ya solo na likolo
lingala.enter_a_valid_formula_above_2: Kotisa formule ya solo na likolo
lingala.yield_hint: Kotisa reaksiõ, na sima loba gram boni ya réactif moko na moko ozali na yango.
lingala.reaction_for_yield: Reaksiõ mpo na calculatrice ya bobimisi
lingala.protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Batela miso na yo na kopanzana, milinga mpe biteni. Lata ba lunettes ya bokengeli liboso ya kobanda mpe kolongola yango te tii bopetoli ekosila.
lingala.nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Ba gants ya nitrile ebatelaka na ba chimiques mingi ya laboratware. Bongola yango mbala moko soki epasuki to ekómi mbindo.
lingala.use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Salela mayele ya kopepa: simba mbeki mosika mpe na loboko tinda mopepe malembe epai ya zolo.
lingala.chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Bosoto ya chimique emonanaka te. Ata bilembo na maboko to na etando ekoki komelama.
lingala.wash_thoroughly_with_soap_and_water_fo: Sukola malamu na sabuni mpe mai ata segɔnde 20, ata soki olati ba gants.
lingala.before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Liboso ya kobanda laboratware nyonso, luka esaleli ya koboma mɔtɔ ya pene, esika ya kosukola miso, douche ya lombangu mpe banzela ya kobima.
lingala.no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: Ata soki ezali moke boni. Molakisi na yo asengeli koyeba mpo azwa bikela ya bopetoli mpe ya bokengeli oyo ebongi.
lingala.test_your_chemistry_knowledge_across_3: Meka boyebi na yo ya chimie na ba niveaux 3 ya mpasi!
lingala.a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: Element moko ya botomboki ezali kobebisa bopikami ya composé! Yanola mituna ya chimie mpo na kozongisa bopikami!
lingala.answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Yanola malamu mpo na kobebisa. Biyano ya mabe ebebisaka bopikami ya composé na yo!
lingala.118_elements_deep_profiles: Ba profils ya mozindo ya element 118.
lingala.iupac_naming_rules: Mibeko ya kopesa nkombo ya IUPAC
lingala.key_metabolic_pathways: Ba nzela ya métabolique ya ntina
lingala.common_drug_classes: Ba classes ya nkisi ya momesano
lingala.key_reactions_in_cooking: Ba reaksiõ ya ntina na kolamba
lingala.20_chemistry_careers_spanning_research: Koleka misala 20 ya chimie oyo ezingi bolukiluki, industrie, mateya mpe mibeko.
lingala.15_ready_to_use_classroom_labs_for_k_1: Ba laboratware 15 ya kelasi oyo ebongisami mpo na K-12.
lingala.common_chemistry_misconceptions_debunk: Ba makanisi ya mabe ya momesano ya chimie ebwakami.
lingala.reference_tables_for_chemistry: Ba tablo ya référence mpo na chimie.
lingala.average_bond_energies: Ba énergies ya bokangani ya moyenne
lingala.specific_heat_capacities: Ba capacités ya moto ya spécifique
lingala.36_sub_tools_118_elements_hundreds_of_: Bisaleli mike 36 · element 118 · Ba solo nkama
lingala.chemistry_is_the_science_of_substances: Chimie ezali siansi ya biloko + mbongwana na yango.
lingala.every_atom_in_your_body_was_forged_in_: Atome nyonso na nzoto na yo esalemaki na monzoto.
lingala.every_reaction_you_observe_was_already: Reaksiõ nyonso oyo omonaka ezalaki kosalema bambula bilio 4 eleki.
lingala.now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Sikoyo ozali na bisaleli mpo na kososola mokili oyo osalemi na yango.
lingala.three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Ba curseurs misato: exposant ya H⁺ (échelle log), capacité ya buffer, molunge. Solution emonisaka moko na kati ya ba bandes 5 ya pH ekeseni. Banzelo te, komonisa te — benda mpe talela.
lingala.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Hypothèse (makomi ya bonsomi — eyano ya solo ezali te): Buffer esaleli boni boyokani ya H+ → pH?
lingala.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Simba ba curseurs mibale makasi. Benda ya misato. Talela oyo ezali kosalema.
lingala.what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: Nini ekómelaka mai ya pɛto (exposant ya H⁺ = -7) tango molunge ebongwanaka?
lingala.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_b: Luka ba réglages mibale oyo ebimisaka bande moko. Nini ezali ndenge moko na kati na yango?
lingala.investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Talela: mpo na nini échelle ya pH ezali logarithmique?
lingala.i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: Nakanisi nasosoli — limbola na maloba na yo moko
lingala.explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Limbola ndenge concentration ya H⁺, buffering mpe molunge ekataka pH esika moko.
lingala.design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Note ya design: elembo ya pH ekeseni ya ba bandes 5; ozala ya kobongisa ya motango te; komonisa te — na nko.
lingala.periodic_table_four_major_blocks: ⚛ Tablo ya ba périodes — ba blocs minene minei
